steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: "A number of recording artists ______ distinctions between Indigenous music and other musical styles." The examples show Tagaq blending Inuit throat singing with electronic music and Pura Fe combining Indigenous rhythms with R&B — they are not keeping styles separate. The blank must mean refuse to accept or do not observe those distinctions.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The [word] needs to mean refuse to maintain boundaries between genres. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — reject: refuse to accept or honor — these artists reject the distinctions by actively blending the styles together. ✓
  • Choice B — disguise: hide or conceal — the artists are not hiding the distinctions; they are openly combining styles in named albums. ✗
  • Choice C — replace: substitute one thing for another — the artists are not replacing Indigenous music with other styles; they are mixing them. ✗
  • Choice D — observe: notice or follow — if they observed the distinctions, they would keep the styles separate, the opposite of what the examples show. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
